revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Soft redirect]]

revision.comment: +R from incomplete name and +R from template shortcut

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Soft redirect]]

revision.comment: +R from incomplete name and +R from template shortcut
Bot: fix double redirect to final target
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[:en:Template:Soft redirect]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 11 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
__NONEWSECTIONLINK__[[File:Softredirarrow.svg|64px|Soft redirect to:|link=]][[:{{#invoke:String|match|1={{{1}}}|2=^:*(.-)$}}|{{{2|{{#invoke:String|match|1={{{1}}}|2=^:*(.-)$}}}}}]]
This page is a [[Wikipedia:Soft redirect|soft redirect]].{{#ifeq:{{{category|¬}}}|¬|{{#switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}} = | {{ns:Category}} = {{error|Error! Please use {{t|category redirect}} instead of this template in Category: space.}} | {{ns:User}} | {{ns:User talk}} = | {{ns:Wikipedia}} | {{ns:Help}} = | {{ns:Template}} = | {{TALKSPACE}} = | #default = }}{{#ifeq:{{Is interwiki link|{{{1}}}}}|yes||{{#ifexist:{{{1}}}||}}}} }}{{Soft redirect protection|nocat={{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{category|¬}}}}}|no|true|false}}}}__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]] [[Category:User soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected talk pages]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia interwiki soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects to nonexistent targets|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

__NONEWSECTIONLINK__[[File:Softredirarrow.svg|64px|Soft redirect to:|link=]][[:{{#invoke:String|match|1={{{1}}}|2=^:*(.-)$}}|{{{2|{{#invoke:String|match|1={{{1}}}|2=^:*(.-)$}}}}}]]
This page is a [[Wikipedia:Soft redirect|soft redirect]].{{#ifeq:{{{category|¬}}}|¬|{{#switch: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}} = | {{ns:Category}} = {{error|Error! Please use {{t|category redirect}} instead of this template in Category: space.}} | {{ns:User}} | {{ns:User talk}} = | {{ns:Wikipedia}} | {{ns:Help}} = | {{ns:Template}} = | {{TALKSPACE}} = | #default = }}{{#ifeq:{{Is interwiki link|{{{1}}}}}|yes||{{#ifexist:{{{1}}}||}}}} }}{{Soft redirect protection|nocat={{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{category|¬}}}}}|no|true|false}}}}__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]] [[Category:User soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirected talk pages]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia interwiki soft redirects|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia soft redirects to nonexistent targets|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
